nasb.text: He who gives to the poor will never want, But he who shuts his eyes will have many curses.

esv.text: Whoever gives to the poor will not want, but he who hides his eyes will get many a curse.

cnv.text: 賙濟窮人的，必不致缺乏； 閉眼不理他們的，必多受咒詛。

ccb.text: 周济穷人的一无所缺， 视而不见的多受咒诅。

csbs.text: 给予穷人的，不致缺乏； 掩目不看的，大受诅咒。
